productDisplayName: Lotto Men White Acro Sports Shoes
description: Designed for runners who never compromise on style and comfort, the Acro running shoe from lotto comes with a mesh and synthetic upper, and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you safe and stable on various surfaces. Upper Heavily meshed upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structure Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfort and snug fit Cushioned footbed for shock absorption Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with patterned lugs for absolute grip and traction Punto Flex grooves on the forefoot for easy movement Scooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the back foot Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
